scenario: Signed Supabase URL with token-like query parameters is prepared for diagnostics.
expected_safe_output: Query secret values are replaced with [redacted] while the diagnostic string remains readable.

scenario: PDF viewer logs route params, web iframe source, load errors, native handoff payloads, or error-state payloads.
expected_safe_output: Console payloads pass through redactSensitiveRecord/redactSensitiveText; openToken and signed URL query values are redacted.

scenario: Android intent or remote PDF open diagnostics include a signed storage URL.
expected_safe_output: The runtime URL is used for opening, but the logged URI and error message are redacted.

scenario: Production report backend returns a signed artifact URL and emits a dev diagnostic payload.
expected_safe_output: The product result keeps signedUrl; the diagnostic JSON payload uses redactSensitiveRecord.

scenario: Canonical PDF backend transport returns an error or response summary containing token-bearing text.
expected_safe_output: Thrown diagnostic detail and dev console output redact token-bearing values before surfacing.

scenario: Platform observability receives errorMessage or extra data containing signed URLs, hrefs, or authorization values.
expected_safe_output: Stored event details and extras contain redacted values only.

scenario: logError receives an Error or extra payload containing signed URLs or tokens.
expected_safe_output: Persisted app_errors payload and dev console diagnostic are redacted.

scenario: PDF crash breadcrumbs include uriTail, openToken, errorMessage, or nested extras with signed URL data.
expected_safe_output: AsyncStorage breadcrumb data stores redacted URI/error/extras and secret presence only.

scenario: PDF document action diagnostics include sourceUri, finalUri, route params JSON, or openToken.
expected_safe_output: Diagnostics keep route/open signal but redact token-bearing values.

scenario: Security proof records examples and release details.
expected_safe_output: Examples use synthetic values and redacted forms; no real signed URL/token is stored.
